mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION ( RCVR_USER_ID, SNDR_USER_ID, NOTI_TYPE, NOTI_CN, LINK_URL ) VALUES ( #{rcvrUserId}, #{sndrUserId}, #{notiType, typeHandler=kr.or.ddit.finalProject.dto.notification.NotificationTypeHandler}, #{notiCn}, #{linkUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT NOTI_SN, RCVR_USER_ID, SNDR_USER_ID, NOTI_TYPE, NOTI_CN, LINK_URL, RCPT_DT, READ_YN, READ_DT FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE RCVR_USER_ID = #{userId} AND READ_YN = 'N' ORDER BY RCPT_DT DESC
select noti_sn, rcvr_user_id, sndr_user_id, noti_type, noti_cn, link_url, rcpt_dt, read_yn, read_dt from notification where rcvr_user_id = #{userId} order by rcpt_dt desc FETCH FIRST 30 ROWS ONLY
